nasb.text: On the other hand I am filled with power— With the Spirit of the Lord— And with justice and courage To make known to Jacob his rebellious act, Even to Israel his sin.

esv.text: But as for me, I am filled with power, with the Spirit of the Lord, and with justice and might, to declare to Jacob his transgression and to Israel his sin.

cnv.text: 至於我，我卻藉著耶和華的靈， 滿有力量、公平和能力， 可以向雅各述說他的過犯， 向以色列指出他的罪惡。

ccb.text: 至于我， 因有耶和华的灵， 我充满权能、正义和力量， 能向雅各宣告他的过犯， 向以色列宣告他的罪恶。
